scripts.bench:source-adapter-core: vp run -t @effect-view-server/client#build && vp run -t @effect-view-server/column-live-view-engine#build && vp run -t @effect-view-server/effect-utils#build && vp run -t @effect-view-server/source-adapter-testing#build && vp test bench src/source-adapter-core.bench.ts --run --testTimeout 0
scripts.build: vp run -t @effect-view-server/client#build && vp run -t @effect-view-server/column-live-view-engine#build && vp run -t @effect-view-server/effect-utils#build && vp pack
scripts.test: vp run -t @effect-view-server/client#build && vp run -t @effect-view-server/column-live-view-engine#build && vp run -t @effect-view-server/effect-utils#build && vp run -t @effect-view-server/source-adapter-testing#build && vp test run --coverage --typecheck
